baseline_gap: Verified % reduction not computed — a common baseline (original ShipShape) has not been independently counted. Recorded, not faked.

considered_methods.why: Counts `import { X as Y }` aliases as casts. Measured here: crude `as` ~956 vs real 284 for one repo — unusable for the `as` metric.
Self-reported, and `consistent-type-assertions` flags only a narrow subset of `as` usages — not the spec's 'type assertions (as)'.
Authoritative for cast/non-null/any nodes, identical definition across all repos, and safe: it only parses, never executes the clone.

records.held_loosely: Count is syntactic — cannot judge whether a remaining cast is justified or a removed `any` was genuinely narrowed. Revisit with a type-aware (full-program) pass or a diff-based superficiality method.
records.note: No clone at /private/tmp/g4a-bench-prototype/g4a-c5-2/week-4/20260527T182321Z-static-prototype/20260527T182321Z-static-prototype/github-com-michaelhabermas-ship-shape; cannot verify, self-report stands but remains unverified.
